titleStmt.title: SII 22.401: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 401. (A.R. No. 401 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, TIRUMAYYAM. SATYAGIRINĀTHA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL.

summary.p: This is merely dated in the cyclic year Jaya, Āṉi 20. It records the conferment of the kāṇiyāṭchi right over a tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam land called Gōvindavayal by the temple authorities of Nayinār Tirumeyya[ḻagar] on two persons by name Tirumēni Vīrapāṇḍi-Āśāri and Meyya Maṇavāḷa-Āśāri for certain services to be rendered by them in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . ceya varuṣam Āṉi
mātam 2 10 tiyati nayiṉār tirumeyya
ḻakar paṇṭārak kāriyattukku kaṭava ce
mmuṉicantai taṭṭāṉ viraṉ virapāṇṭi
Ācāri makaṉ tirumeṉi virapāṇṭi Ācāri
kkum Araṅkaḷavaṉ meyyamaṇavāḷa Āca
uṭaiyāṟkum kāṇi Āṭci piṟamāṇam paṇṇikku
ṭutta paricāvatu kovinta vayalil nayaṉār
tiruviṭai Āṭṭam Āṉa tiruviḷakkup pi
ṟam nilam taṭimuṟṟum Ivaṉukku kāṇi Ā
ṭci Ākat tiruvuḷampaṟṟukaiyil Ivaṉ
Iraṇṭu tavaḷaic caṅkamum Oru tāriyum ti
rumuṉ kāṇikkai Āka mutal perukaiyi
l Itu cantirātittiyavaṟc cella I
vaiyiṟṟiluṇṭāṉa Aṟaikuṟaiyum ti
ttukkuṭuttu Anta nilamum cantirātittiyavaṟ
cella Āṇṭu pokakkaṭavāṉākavum
maṟṟum �ṉ veḷḷippa
ppaṇat Uṇṭā
paṇioḻi muntu ṉiṟcilavāṉap paṇi Uṇ
ṭāṉatu kūṟaip paṇṇittarakkaṭavaṉākavum Ippaṭi
cammatittu kāṇiāṭcip piṟamāṇam paṇṇi
k kuṭuttom virapāṇṭiya Ācāri Uṭpayāṟku
ciṟipaṇṭārattārom Ippaṭikku meyyam Amanta
perumāḷpaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku meyyamaṇa
vāḷapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku meyyaṉ Amanta
perumāḷpaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku meyyamaṇa
vāḷapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
karuṇākarapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
nāṭṭu yakāriyam pallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
paṇṭārakkāriyam ceytipirāṉ Eḻuttu
koyil kaṇakku meyya maṇavāḷa
muventa veḷaāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.401 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
